heading: Contracts; architect and engineering services; surveying and mapping services
label: 569b Contracts; architect and engineering services; surveying and mapping services
text: Contracts for architect and engineering services, and surveying and mapping services, shall be awarded by the Chief of Engineers in accordance with title IX of the Federal Property and Administrative Services Act of 1949.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Federal Property and Administrative Services Act of 1949, referred to in text, is , . Title IX of the Act, which was classified generally to subchapter VI (§ 541 et seq.) of chapter 10 of former Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, was repealed and reenacted by , §§ 1, 6(b), , , 1304, as chapter 11 (§ 1101 et seq.) of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works. For disposition of sections of former Title 40 to revised Title 40, see Table preceding . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 377Pub.
